description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named github-Linux that runs on a workflow call. The workflow uses a concurrency group based on the event name, workflow, and reference, and cancels in-progress jobs for pull requests. It has read-all permissions and a single job CI that runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a container image based on a matrix of Linux distributions. The job checks out a specific repository and version of desul, installs it, and then checks out the main code. It uses caching for ccache and configures Kokkos with various options based on the matrix parameters. The job then builds, tests, and installs Kokkos, and performs additional tests.
